agents.name: Rex
agents.note: V0.27.12 DEPLOYED 2026-05-17 by Marcus (/sprint-deploy-pm). Branch sprint/sprint38-bugfixes-V0.27.12 HEAD 9060b75; both targets verified V0.27.12, services active; Pi suite pytest tests/pi/ -m 'not slow' exit 0. NO sprint.json -- by CIO direction: Ralph plan-driven deep-RCA, design+1441-line plan docs on branch are the contract of record (T1-T15 + reviews + L9 real-chain integration). PRIOR (V0.27.11) FAILED: Drain 26 2026-05-15 proved US-341/342 grep-repoint insufficient -- I-037 still broken (NOT battery-confounded), I-036 unproven (confounded). CARRY-FORWARD META-LESSON (the most important of the whole 10-sprint chain): the shutdown/canary subsystem was 'fixed' 4x (US-308 ladder grep / US-330 list-boots retry / US-341 polkit+raise / US-342 grep repoint) and the real failure recurred through a NEW door every time -- that is the signature of an ARCHITECTURAL root cause, not a string bug. RCA: the journal-scan boot canary's witness is destroyed by the very I/O-storm crash it must detect; every prior fix just changed which needle to grep in a haystack the crash burns down. V0.27.12 removes (does NOT repair) the canary -> crash-proof SD breadcrumb + systemd finalizer (boot-progress-arm + boot-progress-finalize units; CLEAN_COMPLETE = positive proof only). FIXES BUG 2 (instrument honesty) ONLY -- Bug 1 (Pi physically fails to power off under I/O contention at TRIGGER = the real I-036) is the explicitly named FOLLOW-ON, made measurable but NOT fixed by V0.27.12. IRL gate: Drain 27 on rested >=8h pack (no shortcuts). Marcus close-out validation gates: offices/ralph/inbox/2026-05-15-from-marcus-v027x-closeout-validation-gates.md. Do NOT bump regression_manifest F-008/F-011/F-012 (Spool: not re-validated).
